### 👉 After Dark

Location: <Hungarian Canadian Club> @ [979 Kossuth Rd Cambridge](https://maps.app.goo.gl/EX7hcHjhsqnFBD3p7)

#### 9pm-2am

* [Mark Saunders](https://www.instagram.com/marksaundersmusic_official/)
* [Jermz](https://www.instagram.com/jermz0800/)
* [Geebs](https://www.instagram.com/sir_geebs/)

[Info](https://www.instagram.com/p/DWhYgkWROjf/)
